title: Higher-Order Operations, Map, Filter, and Fold · Transformation Lens: Operation Fusion
summary: Summarize a stream of service records without hand-written accumulator loops. Planned artifact: Add and verify the fp operation fusion increment in a tested map-filter-fold analytics pipeline. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Combine adjacent transformations only when semantics, readability, and failure evidence remain intact.
Choose comprehensions, generator expressions, or functional calls by clarity and evaluation needs.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
